key.name: primary-action
key.description: Action triggered by double-clicking the primary button on empty panel space.

key.name: middle-action
key.description: Action triggered by middle-clicking on empty panel space.

key.name: secondary-action
key.description: Action triggered by right-clicking on empty panel space.

key.name: minimize-restore-timeout-seconds
key.description: Restore window timeout, in seconds, for the timed minimize/restore action.

key.name: custom-shortcut-accelerator
key.description: Fallback custom shortcut kept for compatibility with older settings.

key.name: primary-custom-shortcut-accelerator
key.description: Shortcut executed when the left double-click action is set to trigger a custom shortcut.

key.name: middle-custom-shortcut-accelerator
key.description: Shortcut executed when the middle-click action is set to trigger a custom shortcut.

key.name: secondary-custom-shortcut-accelerator
key.description: Shortcut executed when the right-click action is set to trigger a custom shortcut.

key.name: debug-log-enabled
key.description: Write hit-testing and action dispatch details to the GNOME Shell log.
